Here are the keys facts to be a successful trader especially for beginners.

1. Repeating a proven strategy without deviation.

2. ​Strictly managing risk on every single trade.

3. ​Maintaining a clinical distance from the market’s noise.

For beginners 
1). Trade or invest only in uptrend stock which are trading above 100,200,500 moving Average 
2). Check if company is making money in Quarterly report 
3). Enter with small amount so incase if market go down you will be able to average 
4). Be willing to take risk
5). Never claim to know - Ask questions and it's best you work with a financial advisor
6). Don`t start from intraday or options or futures, just start from investing 
Good luck.

I started invseting when I was 45, mostly through sweat & equity. I just turned 55 and this last month was the first time that my passive income broke , to be honest Crypto trading for beginners isn’t easy. But with the right skills and strategy, you’ll be profiting in no time. Getting into a trade is the easy part, but where you get out determines your profit or loss.

A 70% win rate for a strategy with a 1:1 SL to TP ratio is absolutely incredible. The secret sauce is training yourself to pay attention to market structure and NEVER, EVER enter trades until the market has demonstrated directional structure.
I love that you traded the month (rather than a few days or a week) so folks can get a sense of the "reality" of the strategy.
And I really appreciate how you've simplified the steps to successful trades without bogging down viewers in ICT and other ridiculous jargon.....

Crypto is risky as many would say but I think the actual risk in Crypto is not investing, buying the capitulation isn't a tough call, but it is a very tough call to figure out what to do aside holding. I remember when I just got into crypto back in 2019 but later in 2020 I ended up selling it because I was dumb and I didn't understand it. I studied and learned and now I know how it works. Got back into crypto early in 2023 with 10k and I’m up with 128k in a short period of time..

Basically, I just made my first $300,000 in crypto trading. years of grinding, pivoting and failure, ideas not working out multiple consecutive times, depression, anxiety... but oh man once I saw the balance was over 300,000 - it really made it clear that all those years were worth it and has paid off.
